content.question:
Thanks



Slide 6

   - What is the YTD growth rate for KR and JP so far?

And how does it
   compare vs platform?
Is it getting better/worse?
- Do we have the topline breakdown by different countries?

Slide 8

   - #2 – Why is this not solved yet?
When will it be solved?
- #4 -  Can I see the LFF numbers for each market?

And which market is
   meeting/missing targets?

Slide 10 – 15

   - It is quite clear that direct sales is better than spending on ads
   right?
How much are we spending/month on ads right now?

Shall we reduce
   that drastically and put that into hiring of BPOs to do acquisition?
- How much shall we reduce?
How many should we hire?

Slide 17

   - What is the ADO of JP broken down by various markets right now?

Slide 19

   - Is the same new seller program as KR?

How is it working compared to KR
   new sellers?
- Any feedback on the program in general?

Slide 22

   - Is it easy to get JP sellers to migrate these SKUs?

Slide 23

   - On the licenses issue, if we do not face it on KR sellers front, we
   should not face it from JP sellers right?

Slide 27 – 29

   - What is the ADO impact from paid ads vs ams right now?

Which one
   should we get sellers to adopt first?

Or are we confident in pushing both
   at the same time?

Slide 32

   - So sellers who complete in 1st month would get 4 months free comms
   waiver?
- Have we sense check this with the markets yet?

Slide 34

   - Are we sure these are the main levers to get orders?

- It should be
      - Full assortment
      - Competitive pricing
      - Participating in our campaigns
      - Ideally starting paid ads?

Slide 35

   - What is the situation of the sales team right now. Are they FTEs or
   BPOs?

Slide 36- 37

   - Is this worth while to do?

Most of ADO did not come from
   partners/non-partners?
We should just focus on our outbound sales efforts?

Slide 39

   - For VN, is there a possibility of going through FBS?

Or it is purely
   3PF?

- I remember we were doing a bunch of things to incentivize sellers to
   register their SKUs and go into 3PF, how is that coming along?

Others

   - If we see an issue in top sellers doing paid ads, what exactly are we
   doing to encourage them to top up again?

And do we have a sense on which
   sellers and which markets are the main issues?
